latest_evidence_summary: AgentNext route-surface boundaries were split: src/agent-next.ts keeps the exported routing functions; src/agent-next-builder.ts builds the standard AgentNext payload; src/agent-next-activity.ts builds optional dashboard activity command templates; src/agent-next-doctor.ts filters recoverable active goals. Typecheck, focused CLI tests, reporting tests, doctor/status, and diff checks passed, and status still returns agent_next ready_for_next_loop.
